author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
A Quick Rundown on the Splatoon Series
Get up to speed on the Splatoon series in no time flat! Immerse yourself in the characters, ink, music, stories, and everything else there is to know about the world of Splatoon. Happy splatting!

Splatoon Raiders launches July 23, 2026, exclusively on the Nintendo Switch 2 system. Pre-orders are available now on Nintendo eShop: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/splatoon-raiders-switch-2/ 

Splatoon 3 is available now on the Nintendo Switch system. The game is also playable on Nintendo Switch 2: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/splatoon-3-switch/ 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
The Splatoon 3 North American League Show 2026 – Episode 10
One last chance for glory. Who will advance to playoffs? Drop your predictions in the comments!

Tune in to this week's Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 Event #10 livestream on Saturday, June 6 at 4pm PT here: https://www.youtube.com/live/lKrJN12RE5g

Interested in competing? Register here: https://battlefy.com/nintendovs/splatoon3-north-american-league/?utm_source=Events&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=N1122-01&utm_id=N1122-01

Catch up on previous episodes and livestreams here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2JiZAV5BmDXkhjMHRXksU8m6-1y3LUbi

Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required for online features. Membership auto-renews after initial term at the then-current price unless canceled. Not available in all countries. Internet access required for online features. Terms apply. nintendo.com/purchase-terms/

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: www.nintendo.com/us/whatsnew/splatoon-3-north-american-league-2026/
